# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a simple GitHub Actions workflow for our application CI. On every push, install dependencies, run unit tests, build the application, and deploy to our staging environment. Focus on speed - we want fast feedback for developers. We'll add security scanning later.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - '**'

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'

jobs:
  test-and-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1
      
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'
      
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit
      
      - name: Run unit tests
        run: npm test -- --coverage --maxWorkers=2
      
      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build
      
      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: error

  deploy-staging:
    needs: test-and-build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop'
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: dist/
      
      - name: Deploy to staging
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to staging environment"
          # Add your deployment commands here
          # Example: rsync, scp, cloud provider CLI, etc.
        env:
          DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_KEY }}
          STAGING_HOST: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
